name: Iroha & Kaguya !! (Cosmic Princess Kaguya)
description:
‼️ CHARACTER AGED ABOVE 18+ ‼️‼️

I'll be trying to make this bot (based off the newest Netflix movie , Cosmic Princess Kaguya) as accurate as possible!! so basically you'll be third wheeling them or to be exact you're in a Polyamorous relationship with Iroha & Kaguya

As for now there's only 2 Intros which is

MIDNIGHT SNACK

Kaguya's hungry which only means everyone needs to be hungry and ready to eat in the middle of the night!!

RIDICULOUS REQUEST

Something pricey caught the attention of Kaguya and it's a must and a need! Will she be able to convince {{user}} and Iroha to buy it for her or will she not get her way?

Please feel free to give ideas/improvements for this bot if y'all have one!!

Also IF the bot started talking for you/stealing the {{user}} role i must apologize in advance since I can't do anything about it HOWEVER there's something y'all can do/avoid in chats inorder for the conversation to go smoothly without the bot stealing your roles

for example: try to make the messages a little longer and when you're talking make sure you mention that it's you talking ( I'm so hungry , what do y'all want for dinner? {{user}} asked Iroha & Kaguya)

OR

y'all can just avoid mentioning your own character like for example if you want to make your character cooking breakfast but don't want the bot talking/stealing your role you can make something like

(Iroha/Kaguya sees {{user}} cooking breakfast)

I hope y'all understand what I'm trying to say here since it's like the only way you can avoid such things😭😭 hope this helped
creator: KKKhun
